Maintainer.Profile: Unraid Community Application templates for the self-hosted Standard Notes backend. This repository ships two companion templates — StandardNotes-Server (the official standardnotes/server image, end-to-end-encrypted notes sync) and StandardNotes-LocalStack (a Standard-Notes-specific LocalStack configuration that mounts the upstream SNS/SQS bootstrap script and is required for a stable full install). MariaDB and Redis are user-supplied, reusing the containers most Unraid users already run. Companion browser-client template (StandardNotes-WebUI) lives in standardnotes-webui.
